idea-plugin.name: Copy Selection Context
idea-plugin.description:
Copy file paths, line numbers, and code to clipboard for AI assistant workflows.

One shortcut (Ctrl+Alt+C / Cmd+Alt+C) copies your current selection — or the current line when nothing is selected — in a format ready to paste into Claude, ChatGPT, or any AI coding assistant.

Features

  • One-shortcut copy — Ctrl+Alt+C (Windows/Linux) / Cmd+Alt+C (macOS) copies path + line numbers based on your settings
  • Relative or absolute paths — choose project-relative or full absolute paths per your workflow
  • Code content as markdown — include the selected code as a fenced markdown code block with language tag
  • Copy History browser — Ctrl+Alt+H opens a popup to browse and re-copy recent entries
  • GitHub/GitLab permalink — generate a permanent link to the exact lines in your remote repository
  • Template-based output formatting — choose from built-in presets (Claude Code, Path:Line, GitHub Permalink, Custom) or define your own template with variable placeholders
  • Live template preview — settings UI shows a real-time preview and validates template variables before you save
  • Smart line handling — copies the current line number when no text is selected, so the shortcut always produces useful output
  • Status bar widget — displays the last copied text in the IDE status bar; click it to copy again
  • Configurable settings — path type, output format, code trimming, notification toggle, and history size all adjustable at Settings → Tools → Copy Selection Context
  • Context menu integration — all actions available in the editor right-click menu under the Copy Selection Context submenu

Output Format

Output follows the @path#Lline convention:

Path only: @src/main/kotlin/App.kt#L42
Range: @src/main/kotlin/App.kt#L250-253
With code: path + fenced code block in markdown

Source and issue tracker: github.com/hon454/copy-selection-context
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.2

New Features

  • Copy History browser — browse and re-copy recent entries (Ctrl+Alt+H)
  • GitHub/GitLab permalink generation for selected lines
  • Template-based output formatting with presets (Claude Code, Path:Line, GitHub Permalink, Custom)
  • Live template preview and variable validation in settings
  • Status bar widget — shows last copied text, click to re-copy

Improvements

  • Removed project-level settings (simplified to application-level only)
  • Configurable notification toggle and history size
  • Cross-platform build command documentation

Bug Fixes

  • Corrected help anchor link
  • Aligned notification group metadata

group.description: Copy file path and selection context

action.description: Copy file path and line numbers to clipboard (behavior configured in Settings)

action.text: Copy Relative Path with Line Numbers
action.description: Copy file path (relative to project root) and line numbers to clipboard

action.text: Copy Absolute Path with Line Numbers
action.description: Copy absolute file path and line numbers to clipboard
Copy file path, line numbers, and code content in markdown format
Copy GitHub or GitLab permalink for the selected lines
